hero.headline: See What You Cannot See
hero.subheadline: PRISM reveals the invisible dimensions of your projects—culture, politics, consciousness—so you can navigate complexity with wisdom.

feature1.title: Multi-Dimensional Intelligence
feature1.description: Go beyond tasks and timelines. See your project's culture, politics, and human dynamics.

feature2.title: AI-Powered Insights
feature2.description: Discover blind spots systematically. AI analyzes your project and reveals what you're missing.

feature3.title: Theory-Driven Visualizations
feature3.description: Evidence-based approach combining organizational theory with adaptive visual intelligence.

step1.title: Characterize Your Project
step1.description: Quick assessment of your project's complexity, culture, and dynamics

step2.title: Upload Documents
step2.description: Optional: Let AI analyze your project documents for deeper insights

step3.title: Discover Blind Spots
step3.description: Get visualizations and AI-powered insights revealing hidden patterns

cta.ready: Ready to see your project's full reality?

footer.tagline: Revealing the invisible dimensions of projects

validation.teamSizeMax: Team size must be less than 10000
validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date
validation.atLeastOneName: At least one language name is required

projects.nameHelper: Fill in at least one language. The other will be copied automatically if left empty.

morphology.title: Morphological Assessment
morphology.subtitle: Characterize your project across 12 key dimensions
morphology.aiSuggestionsLoaded: AI suggestions loaded from your documents

complexity.title: Complexity Level
complexity.description: How predictable and ordered is your project environment?

options.simple: Simple - Clear cause-effect, best practices work
options.complicated: Complicated - Expert analysis needed, good practices
options.chaotic: Chaotic - No clear patterns, rapid action needed

stakeholder.title: Stakeholder Dynamics
stakeholder.description: What's the nature of stakeholder relationships?

knowledge.title: Knowledge Intensity
knowledge.description: What type of knowledge work dominates?

options.adaptive: Adaptive - Contextual adjustment of known methods

cultural.title: Cultural Context
cultural.description: What's the cultural span of the project?

temporal.title: Temporal Dynamics
temporal.description: What's the time horizon and rhythm?

challenge.title: Primary Challenge
challenge.description: What's the dominant type of challenge?

development.title: Inner Development Needs
development.description: Which inner development dimension is most critical?

options.scarce: Scarce - Severe limitations, creative solutions essential

change.title: Change Intensity
change.description: What's the magnitude of change involved?

options.transitional: Transitional - Planned replacement of current state

information.title: Information Flow
information.description: How does information move in the project?

options.hierarchical: Hierarchical - Chain of command, formal channels
